/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/platform/X11/window.c.o CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/Scene.c.o CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/app/image.c.o CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/app/cube.c.o "CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/matrix-functions.c.o" CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/camera.c.o "CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/model-transform.c.o" CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/projection.c.o CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/rasterizer.c.o CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/model.c.o "CMakeFiles/Mog.dir/src/renderer/framebuffer-functions.c.o" -o Mog  /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so -lm
